Package io.forja.components.validation.fxFormField

Class FxFormField<T>

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
javafx.scene.layout.VBox
io.forja.components.validation.fxFormField.FxFormField<T>
Type Parameters:
T - value type (used by the validator)
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class FxFormField<T> extends javafx.scene.layout.VBox
A form-field row: label + control + optional error message.

FxFormField is a VBox of a FxLabel label, the wrapped control node, and a FxLabel error line that shows when getErrorText() is non-empty. Set setValidator(io.forja.components.validation.fxValidator.FxValidator<T>) to plug a FxValidator into the field; call validate() to compute the error against a value read from getValueSupplier().

Builder usage:

     
      FxFormField emailField = FxFormField.<String>builder()
          .label("Email")
          .control(emailInput)
          .validator(FxValidator.<String>of(FxValidator.required(), FxValidator.email("Invalid email")))
          .valueSupplier(emailInput::getText)
          .required(true)
          .build();
See Also:
  • FxValidator
  • FxFormField.Builder
